'''Zethe Raskin''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] politician.

==Biography==
Zethe Raskin was a self-centered and greedy politician, rising through the ranks of galactic government for over twenty years. She built contacts across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], and became highly influential, able to shift the course of policy with a simple smile.<ref name="UA" />

==Personality and traits==
Beautiful and wealthy, Raskin took advantage of all the benefits that power could provide. She was known to use her looks to gain information on other powerful individuals and then destroy their careers. Raskin was also fluent in a number of galactic languages.<ref name="UA" />

==Equipment==
Zeth Reskin owned a [[Personal Luxury Yacht 3000/Legends|Personal Luxury Yacht 3000]], the ''[[Emerald Empress]]''.<ref name="UA" />

==Behind the scenes==
In the notes from ''[[Ultimate Adversaries]]'', the authors suggested that Raskin might throw her complete support behind [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] and his [[New Order/Legends|New Order]], or possibly function as a mole for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].<ref name="UA" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 2004-06-10 -->''[[Ultimate Adversaries]]'' {{1stm}}
